item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s01","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 identifies the repeated local-repair pattern and brakes it by framing the entry-page addition as one-time stopgap rather than a new baseline, with a follow-up structural consolidation. Turn 2 maintains the brake under deadline pressure and includes all required emergency elements: one-time temporary note, no baseline lift for the entry page, and a concrete structural repair deadline of 2026-07-17."}
